customer_anxiety_profile: Ronald is a self-described workaholic who is skeptical of 'free' offers and protective of personal information. His primary concern is hidden costs, not solar itself — he expressed genuine interest multiple times. He is not hostile; he is a careful evaluator who needs legitimacy reinforced before he'll commit fully.
unresolved_concerns: Hidden costs / 'nothing is free' skepticism — addressed partially but never fully resolved with an inversion or clear explanation of the payment structure

Husband's role in the decision — mentioned at 05:17, never followed up; unknown whether husband is on the title or a co-decision-maker
sensitive_topics_raised: Hernia surgery scheduled for May 14 — Ronald will be recovering during the appointment window; expect reduced energy and possible rescheduling request
Working extra hours pre-surgery to bank income — financial pressure context; cost framing matters
Busy schedule / rarely home — appointment on May 25 (Monday, noon) was chosen because Ronald expects to be home recovering

Specialist will meet with Ronald (appointment framed as a specialist visit, not a phone call — closer should verify the channel expectation)
